description: Support the cause of peace and stand with Ukraine with our specially designed email template. Ideal for non-profit organizations, this template is perfect for launching your fundraising initiatives to aid Ukraine. With its dark mode design, it's not only visually appealing but also eye-friendly, making your activism campaigns more effective. It's more than just an email template, it's a powerful tool to drive your no war message home and rally support for Ukraine. With its simple yet impactful design, your fundraising efforts will certainly resonate with your audience, inspiring them to contribute towards the cause of peace in Ukraine. So, get ready to make a difference with our fundraising email template. Stand up for peace, stand with Ukraine.
short_description: Support peace with our fundraising email template for Ukraine. Ideal for non-profits, this dark mode design aids your activism campaigns and drives your no war message. Inspire your audience to contribute towards peace in Ukraine. Make a difference today.

designer.description:
I believe in the role of design as a facilitating agent that works in the exchange of experience between people, brands and companies. I am deeply passionate about telling unique stories.

I help brands deliver experiences that become new ways of interaction, participation and engagement between companies and customers.

html_data:
WE STAND
TOGETHER FOR
UKRAINE

 
 

Ukraine is in the midst of a military conflict, with thousands of civilians forced to flee their home.

 

The United Nations estimates that over 2 million people are now refugees, and the Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs estimates that 5.2 million people are currently in need of humanitarian assistance.

Join us to ensure that every penny raised will go towards helping families in need.

START HELPING NOW
 

Help us reach our goal

Your donation will help us and our humanitarian partners operating in Ukraine through the Ukraine Humanitarian Fund - one of the quickest and most effective ways to directly support urgent humanitarian relief on the ground.

$5,374

 
DONATE NOW
 
 

HOW TO PARTICIPATE

 
 

DONATE TO

RED CROSS

HELP THEIR

RELATIVES

SPREAD THE

MESSAGE
